name: Debanjan Bhattacharya

experience.title: Product Manager, B2B2C E-commerce SaaS, North America
bullets: Owned end-to-end product roadmap for a B2B2C SaaS platform serving 600+ dealers across North America
Transformed legacy dealer web stack into a scalable, multi-tenant SaaS platform, driving 140% revenue growth
Launched LLM-powered SEO tooling that delivered a 1.8x increase in organic traffic
Drove 60% adoption of advanced product features across dealer base, increasing ARPU by 55%
Surpassed 1 million page views for Mobility Outlook within 8 months of launch
Led cross-functional squads across engineering, design, and business using Agile methodologies
Built KPI dashboards and A/B testing frameworks to enable data-driven product decisions
Integrated AgentAI and LLM pipelines into dealer workflow automation, reducing manual effort
Maintained product backlog using JIRA and Confluence, aligning roadmap with business OKRs
Conducted competitive analysis and user research to inform SaaS pricing and packaging strategy

experience.title: Product Manager, Acquisition and User Experience
bullets: Led SEO-driven content strategy that increased organic traffic by 20% and improved search rankings
Developed mobile app acquisition and UX strategy, achieving significant user activation and lead conversion gains
Collaborated with engineering and design teams to ship user-facing features on a 2-week sprint cadence
Analysed user behaviour using Mixpanel and Fullstory to identify drop-off points and drive UX improvements
Managed acquisition funnel metrics and ran A/B tests to optimise conversion rates

experience.title: Assistant System Engineer
bullets: Led QA team for Citibank's DCF platform, improving testing efficiency and ensuring on-time delivery
Designed and maintained regression test suites for critical banking features
Coordinated release cycles and defect tracking across development and operations teams

achievements: Contributed to 140% revenue growth across a 600+ dealer network.
1.8x increase in organic traffic through SEO enhancements.
60% adoption of advanced features, increasing ARPU by 55%.
Surpassed 1 million page views for Mobility Outlook within 8 months.
